impact: This advances the PP&D plan by adding deterministic, fixture-only coverage for demolition permit requirement extraction quality without broadening shared contracts or touching live crawl/authenticated automation.
summary: Add focused demolition permit extraction validation fixture and test
target_task: Task checkbox-90: Add a focused validation test for demolition permit requirement extraction that checks only the seven fixture categories, source evidence IDs, confidence bounds, deduplication, and explicit stop-gate classifications.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
